overview: A continuation strategy backtester that detects and scores bullish setups using Sunday levels, EMAs, 1H FVGs, and daily candle bias, then reports win rate, P&L, and trade-by-trade results.
features: Upload CSV price data and auto-calculate 200 EMA, 20 EMA, and 50 SMA
Auto-detect bullish continuation setups using daily candle bias and confluence scoring
Sunday level input with overlap detection against moving averages and fair value gaps
Entry, stop-loss, and TP1 calculation with risk-to-reward display
Add logic detector for next Sunday level opportunities
Invalidation monitoring with exit reason labeling
Interactive price chart with entry/exit markers, MA lines, Sunday levels, and FVG zones
Backtest results with win rate, profit factor, max drawdown, and full trade log
